(1) A person who violates the provisions of s. 316.2085 (2) or (3) shall be cited for a moving violation, punishable as provided in chapter 318.

(2) A person who exceeds the speed limit in excess of 50 miles per hour or more in violation of s. 316.183 (2), s. 316.187 , or s. 316.189 shall be cited for a moving violation, punishable as provided in chapter 318.
markdown:
### Chapter 316. State Unif. Traffic Control
##### § 316.1926 — Additional offenses

(1) A person who violates the provisions of s. 316.2085 (2) or (3) shall be cited for a moving violation, punishable as provided in chapter 318.

(2) A person who exceeds the speed limit in excess of 50 miles per hour or more in violation of s. 316.183 (2), s. 316.187 , or s. 316.189 shall be cited for a moving violation, punishable as provided in chapter 318.

subsections.text: A person who violates the provisions of s. 316.2085 (2) or (3) shall be cited for a moving violation, punishable as provided in chapter 318.

A person who exceeds the speed limit in excess of 50 miles per hour or more in violation of s. 316.183 (2), s. 316.187 , or s. 316.189 shall be cited for a moving violation, punishable as provided in chapter 318.
